languages.text: "Что ж, рад что ты со мной. Пойдем и прикончим эту тварь".
"Well, it's good that you're with me. Let's go and finish this thing."
languages.original_text: "Что ж, рад что ты со мной. Пойдем и прикончим эту тварь".

traits.locale_text: "Well, it's good that you're with me. Let's go and finish this thing."
"Well, it's good that you're with me. Let's go and finish this thing."
"Well, it's good that you're with me. Let's go and finish this thing."

languages.text: 「まあ、君がそばにいるのはいいことだ。この件を終わらせるために、行こう。」
languages.original_text: "Well, it's good that you're with me. Let's go and finish this thing."

traits.locale_text: 「まあ、君がそばにいるのはいいことだ。この件を終わらせるために、行こう。」

languages.text: "Güzel, yanımda olman iyi oldu. Gidip bu işi bitirelim."
languages.original_text: "Well, it's good that you're with me. Let's go and finish this thing."

traits.locale_text: "Güzel, yanımda olman iyi oldu. Gidip bu işi bitirelim."

languages.text: «Bueno, agradezco su asistencia. Vamos a poner fin a esto».
languages.original_text: "Well, it's good that you're with me. Let's go and finish this thing."

traits.locale_text: «Bueno, agradezco su asistencia. Vamos a poner fin a esto».

languages.text: “好吧，很高兴有你加入，我们去了结这件事吧。”
languages.original_text: "Well, it's good that you're with me. Let's go and finish this thing."

traits.locale_text: “好吧，很高兴有你加入，我们去了结这件事吧。”

languages.text: « Je ne suis pas {mf|fâché|fâchée} que vous soyez de la partie. Allons achever ce monstre. »
languages.original_text: "Well, it's good that you're with me. Let's go and finish this thing."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne suis pas {mf|fâché|fâchée} que vous soyez de la partie. Allons achever ce monstre. »

languages.text: "Tja, dann ist es gut, dass Ihr bei mir seid. Lasst uns gehen und dieses Ding erledigen."
languages.original_text: "Well, it's good that you're with me. Let's go and finish this thing."

traits.locale_text: "Tja, dann ist es gut, dass Ihr bei mir seid. Lasst uns gehen und dieses Ding erledigen."
